data.content: Plan review requested revision: token usage is logged only at session scope, but agent-history sessions can span multiple beatIds. That would force duplication or misattribution when diagnostics need per-agent, per-beat counts. Revise the plan to persist beat-scoped token_usage entries, or otherwise carry beat identity through capture and parsing. Also align the proposed beat summary field name consistently (the plan uses both tokenUsage and tokenUsageByAgent).
